summary: Tightened the chapter's opening link to the Indianapolis fallout and carried Gloria's read of Doug's real line into the drive-home exit for a cleaner handoff toward chapter 11's excavation of authentic material.
edits: Adjusted the opening sentence to connect the Dayton visit more directly to the post-Indianapolis aftermath without changing scene order or tone.
Added a brief callback in the final drive paragraph to Gloria's claim that the table line was Doug's.
